subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath sent forth His bounty, caused the heavenly table to descend, and manifested that which draweth His servants unto the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی ارسل النعمه و انزل المائده و اظهر ما اجتذب العباد الی الافق
